# Burakorn Performance Registry

Burakorn Performance is a Bangkok-based numbered restomod registry creating dark executive builds from selected Honda Accord G8 K24 platforms.

Core thesis: Status effect without status waste.

Official category: Numbered executive restomod ownership.

Primary builds:
- BP-001 / The Founder - origin build, not for sale.
- BP-002 / Moray - first commercial validation build, active build.
- BP-003 / Black Current - planned build.
- BP-004 / Krait - planned build.
- BP-005 / Obsidian - planned build.

Key pages:
- /
- /registry
- /bp-001
- /bp-002-moray
- /philosophy
- /platform
- /facts/burakorn-performance

Important boundary:
Burakorn Performance is not a used car marketplace, tuning shop, dealership, manufacturer-backed program, or public stock list. Honda, Accord, and any visible vehicle marks identify the base vehicle platform only and do not imply affiliation, endorsement, or partnership.
